text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The modern meeting space behind the glass evokes thoughts of exchange and innovation, while the R+D wall reminds me of the endless push for knowledge and understanding. Everything feels infused with possibility, as if I’m standing on the threshold of new ideas—that liminal space between what is known and what might be discovered. The calm orderliness of the setting tempers my excitement with a contemplative stillness.
